text:
is an artbook published by GAINAX on 30 March 2001 and republished digitally by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 07 June 2020. It features the original drawings of the TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion.

Overview

Volume 3 contains about 770 original drawings from the TV series' opening sequence and episodes 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 18 and 26. Color illustrations published in magazines and their original drawings are also included. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000806/ 

The 2020 version includes 12 color pages that were not present in the original release.
